feed.title: Maiste [mɑːïsté]
feed.subtitle: Another useless blog you might find useful.

entry.title: First Post!
entry.content:
If you are here for the first time, I welcome you in this knowledge temple ! I created this blog to share my knowledge database, sometimes express my point of view, improve my English skills and build a place where I can just share what I want.

It's always nice to have some feedback so you can reach me on this mail.

In the following months, I will do my best to improve the content and the quality of this website.

Hope you'll enjoy it!
